findings.message: PARSER_VERSION is declared as a function-local const inside computeSourceHash. Functionally correct, but lifting it to module scope (e.g. `const PARSER_VERSION = "2";` near the top of sync.ts) makes the knob easier to reference from logs/telemetry later and signals intent more clearly as a 'module-wide versioning constant'. Purely stylistic — not a bug.

parser_edge_cases_verified.english_heading_with_eof: Primary returns empty array; fallback scan bounded to 1 line (scanLimit=min(1,9)=1); both paths null-out cleanly via joinParagraph([]) → null. No crash.
parser_edge_cases_verified.soft_wrapped_paragraphs: Primary loop accumulates consecutive non-empty trimmed lines; joinParagraph joins with ' ' and collapses \s+ correctly.
parser_edge_cases_verified.legacy_fallback_bound: scanLimit = Math.min(enLines.length, j + 8) with j=1 preserves the original 8-line scan bound for '### <ProjectName>'. Untouched by the rewrite.
parser_edge_cases_verified.paragraph_terminators: Blank line OR any /^#{1,6}\s/ heading. Bullet lines (- item) do NOT terminate — acceptable because real READMEs have a blank line before bullet sections, and the stage-5 intent of the fix was the paragraph capture, not bullet handling.
parser_edge_cases_verified.null_out_on_english_removal: Verified: if '## English' is removed later, englishIndex=-1 → descriptionEn=null; source_hash flips via readmeSha change → shouldRegenerate=true → updatePayload.description_en = null is written. Flow intact.

hash_bump_semantics.collision_risk: None. Whole payload is hashed, not parsed back out — '|v2' suffix cannot collide with a repo literally named 'v2'.
hash_bump_semantics.one_shot_invalidation: Correct. All rows re-extract exactly once on the next sync after deploy; subsequent syncs with unchanged state keep source_hash stable (hashMatches=true → shouldRegenerate=false). Bumping to '3' later triggers another one-shot with no recurrent churn.

style_checks.console_logs: No debug console.logs left. Only intentional ones: console.warn on GitHub API error in readme.ts, console.error on per-repo sync failure in sync.ts.
style_checks.jsdoc_accuracy: parseEnglishDescription JSDoc (readme.ts lines 127-153) correctly documents the new primary-first + legacy-fallback flow with both shape examples. Matches implementation.
style_checks.iterator_naming: Fallback uses j/k — sensible scoping; no shadowing of outer i from the primary path. Readable.
style_checks.complexity: Primary path O(n) over enLines slice; fallback 8-line bounded scan + O(n) paragraph accumulation. No nested scans introduced, no accidental O(n²).

notes.testability: parseEnglishDescription is a pure transform over string[] — trivially unit-testable with fixtures if a harness ever lands. Absence of tests NOT flagged (already catalogued).
notes.supabase_write_path: sync.ts update path correctly writes description_en: null via updatePayload.description_en = descriptionEn when parser returns null. No conditional suppression. Idempotency preserved.
